_comment: Ops portfolio for the Standing Report (lib/standing-report.ts). Copy this file, edit the values, and point VIDI_OPS_CONFIG at it (absolute path) to enable service / deploy-verdict / nightshift probes. With VIDI_OPS_CONFIG unset (or the file missing/corrupt), the report degrades honestly to 'no services configured' / 'not configured' — never an error. Path fields are absolute-or-workspace-relative: a relative value is resolved under WORKSPACE_ROOT. Values below are examples only.
